info.title: Meter Public API
info.description: Service-scoped prepaid credits, buyer accounts, usage reservations, and metered MCP usage for Meter integrations.

get.summary: Read the Meter Public API v1 OpenAPI contract
Read process, ledger, production readiness, reservation, and Stripe webhook health

put.summary: Create or update one service brand record

post.summary: Create a service API key and return the secret once

get.summary: Read the service MCP gateway and customer authentication configuration

put.summary: Create or update an MCP gateway integration

get.summary: List provider webhook endpoints and recent deliveries

post.summary: Create a signed provider webhook endpoint

201.description: Webhook endpoint and one-time signing secret

post.summary: Queue and immediately attempt a test provider webhook
Invoke an upstream MCP server through Meter prepaid billing

get.summary: List recent service API audit events
List usage rollups, revenue-share preview, and recent usage events

post.summary: Release expired held reservations for one service
Register or update a service-scoped buyer customer

get.summary: Read a buyer prepaid credit account
Read recent buyer credit ledger entries

patch.summary: Suspend or resume a buyer account

post.summary: Apply an idempotent manual credit grant or refund
Create a Stripe Checkout top-up or ledger-only top-up
Create a short-lived signed buyer portal session URL
Quote and authorize a billable MCP operation, optionally holding credits by requestId
Commit a previously authorized operation and debit credits
Release a held reservation after protected work fails

serviceBearerAuth.description: Service API key sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>. x-meter-service-key is also accepted by Meter.

customerBearerAuth.description: Buyer API key or service-configured OAuth access token. x-meter-customer-key is also accepted for API-key integrations.

PaymentRequired.description: Insufficient prepaid credits; includes a signed buyer top-up URL

AccountSuspended.description: The buyer credit account is suspended for this service

CreatedServiceApiKeyResponse.description: Created service API key; secret is returned once

CustomerAccountResponseWithApiKey.description: Service customer, buyer API key, and credit account

TopUpResponse.description: Stripe Checkout redirect URL or ledger-only account update

origin.description: HTTP(S) buyer origin for generated portal/checkout URLs. Must be same-origin with Meter or included in METER_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.

returnUrl.description: Optional checkout return URL. Must be HTTP(S) and on the same origin as origin.

origin.description: HTTP(S) buyer origin for the signed portal URL. Must be same-origin with Meter or included in METER_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.
